svg.text: START mass-casualty triage protocol + CBRN decontamination extension, encoded in OWL/RDF with SWRL rules, cross-validated by a Pellet reasoner
1 · Four START assessment dimensions (each a disjoint-pair class)

g.text: Pellet Reasoner — cross-validates two independent inference paths
DL classification (owl:equivalentClass) vs. SWRL-rule inference (treatmentRequired + hasSeverityScore), over 48 clinically-coherent profiles
CBRN Rule 5: a NotDecontaminated patient is equivalent to class RequiresDecontaminationFirst.
Action 'treat' AND all four tag_* actions are contraindicated until decontamination completes.
Only openAirway and decontaminate remain unconditionally available regardless of status.
hasHazardType : Patient → HazardType Duration determines repeated 'decontaminate'
action-calls needed before treatment may begin.
Also disjoint from all TriagePriority classes.

svg.text: 3 · TreatmentAction inventory (7 individuals) and contraindicates edges
contraindicates is an owl:SymmetricProperty on TreatmentAction. 'treat' and all four tag_* actions are additionally blocked
by decontamination state (Section 2) - a separate, orthogonal contraindication not shown as an edge above.
4 · SWRL rule catalog — all 9 rules, isRuleEnabled = true
2 × owl:AllDisjointClasses axioms (HazardType subclasses; TriagePriority classes) enforce mutual exclusivity beyond pairwise disjointness.

Internally cross-validated (DL vs. SWRL, 48/48 profiles agree) and externally validated against Syn-STARTS: 630/630 (100.0%) label agreement on all mechanically-scoreable scenarios, before compilation into the RL agent's per-state action mask.
